testsuite.name: vip.trushin.intellij.workflows.DiagnosticTest

testcase.name: Diag 1: Branch popup - type and see what happens
Diag 3: Try Git checkout via action

testsuite.system-out: DIAG: Search fields after type: 2 DIAG: SpeedSearch: 0 DIAG: HeavyWeightWindow: 1 DIAG: ActionMenuItem after enter: 0 DIAG: HeavyWeightWindow after enter: 2 DIAG: Checkout items: 1 DIAG: Git.Unstash -> UnstashDialogFixture: 0 DIAG: Git.Unstash -> MyDialog: 0 DIAG: Git.UnstashChanges -> UnstashDialogFixture: 0 DIAG: Git.UnstashChanges -> MyDialog: 0 DIAG: Vcs.Git.Unstash -> UnstashDialogFixture: 0 DIAG: Vcs.Git.Unstash -> MyDialog: 0 DIAG: Branch info: not-set DIAG: Checkout result: not-set
